mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_device_binding WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT b.*, d.device_sn, d.device_type, d.device_name, d.status AS device_status, d.last_push_time FROM t_device_binding b LEFT JOIN t_device d ON b.device_id = d.device_id WHERE b.elder_id = #{elderId} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.bind_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_device_binding WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND elder_id = #{elderId} AND measurement_type = #{measurementType} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
